Container.Name: khoj-aio
Container.Overview:
Khoj is a self-hosted AI second brain for chatting with your docs, the web, and local or hosted LLMs. [center][b][color=#ff8c00]JSONbored Verified AIO Template[/color][/b][/center]
This Unraid AIO template focuses on the simplest safe first-run possible. It wraps upstream Khoj into a single-container deployment with an internally managed PostgreSQL database by default, while still exposing advanced overrides for power users.
[b]All-In-One (AIO) Edition[/b] No manual docker-compose conversion. No required external PostgreSQL setup. No extra sidecar container just to get the UI up. Install it, optionally set credentials, and go.
[b]Initial Setup:[/b] 1. Optionally set your Admin Email, Admin Password, and Django Secret Key below. 2. If you leave the password or secret blank, secure values will be generated automatically on first boot and saved in your mapped config folder under `/root/.khoj/aio/generated.env`. 3. Click Apply and wait for the logs to show Khoj is ready. 4. Restart the container once after first boot so all settings are applied cleanly.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: The main Khoj web interface port.

Config.Name: AppData - Khoj Config
Config.Description: Stores generated credentials, uploads, and Khoj configuration.

Config.Name: AppData - PostgreSQL Data
Config.Description: Internal PostgreSQL database storage for the AIO deployment.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Admin login email for the Khoj admin panel. You can change it later.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional. Leave blank to auto-generate a secure admin password on first boot and save it in the mapped config folder.

Config.Name: Django Secret Key
Config.Description: Optional but recommended. Leave blank to auto-generate a secure secret key on first boot.

Config.Name: Anonymous Mode
Config.Description: Default beginner mode. Set to false if you want sign-in and multi-user behavior.

Config.Name: AppData - HuggingFace Cache
Config.Description: Persistent cache for Hugging Face downloads and model assets.

Config.Name: AppData - SentenceTransformer Cache
Config.Description: Persistent cache for SentenceTransformer embeddings and related model files.

Config.Name: Use Internal PostgreSQL
Config.Description: Default single-container mode. Set to false only if you are intentionally using an external PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: Bind Host
Config.Description: Container bind address. Leave at 0.0.0.0 for standard Unraid bridge networking.

Config.Name: Non-Interactive Startup
Config.Description: Recommended for unattended container startup.

Config.Name: Extra CLI Args
Config.Description: Optional extra arguments appended to the Khoj startup command.

Config.Name: [External DB] PostgreSQL Host
Config.Description: Optional external PostgreSQL host. Setting this effectively bypasses the internal AIO database.

Config.Name: [External DB] PostgreSQL Port
Config.Description: External PostgreSQL port.

Config.Name: [External DB] PostgreSQL Database
Config.Description: External PostgreSQL database name.

Config.Name: [External DB] PostgreSQL User
Config.Description: External PostgreSQL username.

Config.Name: [External DB] PostgreSQL Password
Config.Description: External PostgreSQL password.

Config.Name: [AI] OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI-compatible cloud deployments using OpenAI itself.

Config.Name: [AI] Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Optional Anthropic API key for Claude models.

Config.Name: [AI] Gemini API Key
Config.Description: Optional Gemini API key for Google Gemini models.

Config.Name: [AI] OpenAI-Compatible Base URL
Config.Description: Use this for Ollama, vLLM, LocalAI, LiteLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Example: http://your-ollama-host:11434/v1/.

Config.Name: [AI] Default Chat Model
Config.Description: Optional default chat model name for compatible endpoints. Example: llama3.1.

Config.Name: [AI] Debug Mode
Config.Description: Optional. Set to True only when troubleshooting with more verbose upstream debug behavior.

Config.Name: [Search] External SearxNG URL
Config.Description: Optional SearxNG endpoint for built-in web search. Example: http://192.168.1.20:8080.

Config.Name: [Search] Serper API Key
Config.Description: Optional paid web-search API key from Serper.

Config.Name: [Search] OloStep API Key
Config.Description: Optional webpage-read API key from OloStep.

Config.Name: [Search] Firecrawl API Key
Config.Description: Optional Firecrawl API key for web search and read flows.

Config.Name: [Search] Exa API Key
Config.Description: Optional Exa API key for search and webpage reading.

Config.Name: [Code] Terrarium URL
Config.Description: Optional external Terrarium sandbox URL for code execution. Example: http://192.168.1.30:8080.

Config.Name: [Code] E2B API Key
Config.Description: Optional E2B API key if you want remote code sandboxing instead of Terrarium.

Config.Name: [Code] Operator Enabled
Config.Description: Enable Khoj's operator/computer features if you have separately configured the required environment and tooling.

Config.Name: [Code] Docker Socket
Config.Description: Optional. Only map the Docker socket if you intentionally want to support operator/computer workflows.

Config.Name: [Access] Public Domain or IP
Config.Description: Required for remote access through a custom hostname or IP. Do not include http:// or https://.

Config.Name: [Access] Allowed Internal Domain
Config.Description: Optional internal hostname/IP for reverse-proxy or load-balancer setups. If blank, Khoj defaults to KHOJ_DOMAIN.

Config.Name: [Access] Disable HTTPS Enforcement
Config.Description: Set to True when intentionally serving over plain HTTP on a trusted LAN or behind a reverse proxy that terminates TLS.

Config.Name: [Auth] Resend API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Enables emailed magic-link login for multi-user access.

Config.Name: [Auth] Resend Sender Email
Config.Description: Optional sender address used for magic-link authentication emails.

Config.Name: [Voice] ElevenLabs API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Enables text-to-speech voice responses using ElevenLabs.

Config.Name: [Privacy] Disable Telemetry
Config.Description: Set to True to opt out of Khoj's anonymous self-hosted telemetry.
